programme.title: The King of Queens: Baker's Doesn't
programme.desc: When Doug and Carrie run into Father McDaniel at the movies they feel guilty that they haven't been to church in some time and sign up to help out during the busy holiday season. Meanwhile, Arthur and Spence try to write a Christmas carol.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Fresh Brood
programme.desc: In order to help convince Carrie it's time for a child, Doug borrows the baby from Danny so they can give parenting a test run. Doug quickly adjusts to being a dad, but the transition isn't as smooth for Carrie.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Slippery Motives
programme.desc: While staying at a hotel in St. Louis, Missouri, a Louisiana woman drowns in a bathtub. Her husband claims it was an accident, but detectives are skeptical as they discover evidence of foul play.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Badge of Deceit
programme.desc: Women in a small Louisiana city live in fear of a rapist who becomes so experienced he leaves no clues to his identity. But computer technology and behavioral science combine to give police a new forensic tool: geographical profiling.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Invisible Intruder
programme.desc: A Texas woman claims that an intruder attacked her and killed two of her sons, but detectives question her story when they find some inconsistencies at the crime scene.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Ultimate Betrayal
programme.desc: Fire sweeps through a mansion, killing two children, all evidence leads to the mother.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Social Circle
programme.desc: Four young adults are brutally murdered in an affluent Texas neighbourhood, and the crime scene yields little evidence. The next door neighbours see two people in black walking nearby and their descriptions become a key element in solving the case.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fate Date
programme.desc: When a couple is found dead inside their home, police question if a third victim found outside was just a good Samaritan or involved in the crime. E-mail tracking leads police to the world of internet dating and to the den of a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Whodunit
programme.desc: An evening out to a murder mystery theatre turns into a real life whodunit.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Horse Play
programme.desc: A young, happily married woman died tragically in a horseback riding accident. Her husband seemed far from grief-stricken and, when they investigated his background, police discovered a web of lies and a proficiency with pharmaceuticals.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sibling Rivalry
programme.desc: Two of America’s premier pornographers happen to be brothers. When one turns up dead, his brother confesses to shooting him. The question for investigators is whether the shooting was pre-meditated.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pastoral Care
programme.desc: The body of a female prison guard shows up in a landfill and investigators suspect the hundreds of prisoners in the facility where she worked.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Line of Fire
programme.desc: A fundamentalist group starts attacking and robbing banks in the Pacific Northwest.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Root of All Evil
programme.desc: Prosecutors turned to a plant pathologist and a dendrochronologist to solve a missing person's case.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Bag of Evidence
programme.desc: When a 9-year old girl disappears, an anonymous caller leads police to her body.

programme.title: Forensic Files: All Charged Up
programme.desc: Philadelphia authorities use an anonymous letter to locate a perpetrator.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bad Blood
programme.desc: A young doctor in a rural community is accused of sedating and sexually assaulting two of his female patients. DNA tests demonstrate that the doctor is innocent, but the women continue to insist that he sedated and raped them.

programme.desc: The Memphis Outlaws finish their race against the Las Vegas racers, but before they can leave town, they get a call from a group of guys in California looking to race. Memphis agrees to stay to race against Cali, but a brawl breaks out before they start.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Hearts of Darkness

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Alone: Blazed and Confused

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Category Five Survival

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Alone: Gary of the Jungle
programme.desc: All-star survivalist and wildcard Gary Golding takes on a jungle for the first time completely alone in Belize. Without a partner, Gary forms a bond with a turtle he names Timmy but a deep cut and dangerous infection threaten Gary's challenge.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Swamp Queen
programme.desc: In the snake-filled Mississippi swamps, Gabrielle, a former fan survivalist takes on the full 21-day challenge. Gabrielle and Brian are faced with deadly snakes, unrelenting mosquitos, nocturnal predators and a relentless week-long thunderstorm.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Alone: Max Pushed to the Max
programme.desc: Constantly on the run to avoid territorial rhinos, elephants and lions, survivalist Max takes on the punishing African Savannah. Max gets a kill it but it puts his challenge at greater risk, as predators close in to take his hard-earned win.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Case of Dress Distress
programme.desc: Jamie is devastated when she falls in love with an over-budget gown her bossy bridesmaid picks out. Natalie has trouble committing to a dress in the absence of her ill mother. Fitting bride Nadia is nervous her reception gown will be the wrong colour.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Sexy Sells
programme.desc: Nik Wallenda pushes for his wife Erendira to choose a sexy gown – within limits! Amy returns for a dress that's even racier than her last one, but her twin still begs her to cover up. Jaya is hesitant to adhere to her fiancé's form fitting preference.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: I'm the Bride, Leave Some Space!
programme.desc: Nikki is looking for a fun, party-ready dress for her wild New Year's Eve wedding. Bride Natalie dreams of a finding a ball gown so massive that wedding guests will struggle to get close to her and someone could even 'hide' underneath it.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Not with Those Chubby Arms
programme.desc: Angelica is looking for the perfect strapless gown but her mom thinks her arms are 'too chubby' to be seen! Tiffany and her crew of gospel singers are preparing for her holy matrimony.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: America: Red, White and Randy
programme.desc: Randy surprises one of his biggest fans with an invitation to America's wedding. Emily wants a plain dress but her family begs for more. When Ashley's dress reveals a big issue during alterations, Shay must think quick.

programme.title: The First 48: Shooting Spree/ Lady in the Fire
programme.desc: In Detroit, Anthony Wright Jr. investigates the death of a man found shot behind an abandoned house. Also, Sergeant Kevin Lundy in Memphis tries to solve the murder of a woman found dead inside a house after a fire.

programme.title: The First 48: Dead Sleep/ Tag Team
programme.desc: Det. Ballman investigates a brutal beating death in the close-knit east end neighbourhood.

programme.title: The First 48: The Girl Who Knew Too Much/ The Guardian
programme.desc: In Dallas, an unidentified girl is found brutally shot in a field, and may have been killed for her silence. Then in Cleveland, a young father is shot in the head trying to break up a fight.

programme.title: The First 48: Killer Connection/ Bloody Birthday
programme.desc: In Dallas, a young father is shot dead outside a bar, and the killer is caught on video. Then, in Cleveland, a mother of six is gunned down on her birthday, leaving her family devastated.

programme.title: The First 48: The Fallen Angel
programme.desc: A teenager is found naked and shot dead in a park in Atlanta. With no evidence, rookie detective Andre Lowe works twice as hard to discover what happened. The entire Homicide Unit comes together to help identify and recreate the teen's final moments.

programme.title: The First 48: Graveyard Love
programme.desc: In New Orleans, a man is ambushed in front of his grandmother's house. Detectives suspect a woman close to the victim may have arranged the shooting, but they need hard evidence to prove it, and quickly before it's too late.

programme.title: The First 48: The Ties That Bind
programme.desc: When a man is gunned down with an AK-47 in his home, Atlanta detective Kevin Leonpacher discovers the victim's wife holds a dark secret that could tear her family apart.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Dream Crusher
programme.desc: The guys try to kiss unsuspecting strangers until a special guest crashes the party, they focus-group their absurd life stories as potential movies, and the big loser gets a room-full of enemies while judging a kids' talent show.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Joke and Dagger
programme.desc: The guys crash a gallery opening where their antics aren't appreciated, they pass bizarre judgment on unsuspecting grocery shoppers, and the loser takes a spin on a terrifying wheel where one wrong move could have deadly consequences.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Pseudo-Sumo
programme.desc: The guys freeze out skaters at an ice rink's rental counter, and head to the mall where they have the audacity to ask strangers to mind their manners. Then, tonight's loser is down for the count after donning a diaper for a sumo-sized punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Car Sick
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q freak out a focus group by reading ridiculous answers, and then participate in a thrilling toilet paper shootout in their favourite market. Plus, the loser’s fancy dinner party turns into the messiest ride of his life.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Turning the Tables
programme.desc: Sal, Joe, Murr and Q take a spin in a motorized chair hoping the kindness of strangers will keep them on track. Tonight's big loser walks away bruised and battered when he's forced to clear some tables in an unusual way.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Lords of the Ring
programme.desc: The guys skirt the law while posing as receptionists, then go fishing at an unlikely locale. And the heat is on tonight's big losers as they try to give one unlucky customer the deal of a lifetime.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: No Child Left Behind
programme.desc: The guys pitch toys that should be kept away from tots, face off at a market, and see sports at the mall. The big loser sticks his nose where it doesn't belong.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Pulling the Rug
programme.desc: The guys run a surprise challenge, and a stint at The Cake Boss's counter is anything but sweet. Then, advice for kida turns awkward when heard by strangers, and tonight's loser looks for a new 'do.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Speech Impediment
programme.desc: Joe, Q, Sal and Murr crack each other up from behind glass, then test out awkward proposals. Plus, the big loser gets tongue-tied while speaking to government officials, and later, Joey Fatone goes behind the scenes on after party.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Card Against Humanity
programme.desc: Q, Murr, Joe and Sal have customers seeing red while working at an optician's office, then get too close for comfort eavesdropping on strangers' conversations. Plus, the big loser gives the business at a networking event.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Bull Shiatsu
programme.desc: Sal, Joe, Murr and Q try to hold it together as receptionists checking in some strange characters. Later, they offer up odd rewards to helpful strangers, and the big loser gets the stuffing squished out of him at the mall.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Running of the Bullies
programme.desc: Q, Murr, Joe and Sal offer up peculiar specials at a steakhouse and get creepy while helping to clean a prop house. Plus, tonight's big loser realizes he may need his own lifeguard after making waves at the pool.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Dumbbell
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr test their parental instincts by reading their daughters' diaries, then give presentations that are anything but normal. Later, tonight's big loser gets painfully honest with bodybuilders at the gym.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Eggman
programme.desc: Joe, Q, Sal and Murr go incognito to fool unsuspecting strangers, then pop in for a coffee just in time to miss out on a big prize. Plus, tonight's big loser might just crack under the pressure of his rotten punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Cake Loss
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Murr and Joe mean no disrespect to patrons at a food court, then cut to the chase while posing as tailors. Later, strangers pick sides in a wild debate, and tonight's big loser takes the cake with his crumby punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Antisocial Network
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q play matchmakers at the food court, then switch fields to pose as architects, sharing some perplexing new building technology. Plus, tonight's big loser makes a connection while networking, and won't let go.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: X Man
programme.desc: The guys compete in their first four-way challenge. Later, see what happens when they try to lead a kid's art class, and which loser fails so badly that he's hit with an on-the-spot punishment that leaves him seeing red.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Medium, Well Done
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Q, and Joe pose as TV execs pitching insane shows, and tonight's big loser undergoes a psychic reading that puts his real life on the wrong track.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Drum and Drummer
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Q and Joe convince shoppers to repeat odd catch phrases, then go mental as psychoanalysts. Plus, tonight's losers perform at a halftime show.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Butt of the Joker
programme.desc: The guys pair up in focus group presentations, and tonight's loser tries to cure the public of a nasty habit, but gets people smoking mad.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Stuffed Turkey
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Joe and Murr act as not-so-handy-men assembling furniture. Thanksgiving comes early for tonight's loser when he must talk turkey at a dating event.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Crickets
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Q and Joe head to Joey Fatone's hot dog joint to dish up weenies, and tonight's big loser performs a stand-up comedy routine but barely gets out alive.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Statue of Limitations
programme.desc: The guys pose as inhospitable restaurant hosts, then beg strangers to babysit their grandfathers. Plus the longest punishment in Jokers' history.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Brother of the Sisterhood
programme.desc: The guys play helpless oddballs in a waiting room, then ask grocery shoppers for cash. Then, tonight's loser becomes the number one enemy of women everywhere.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dark Side of the Moon
programme.desc: The guys make passes at supermarket shoppers, then pose as reporters. Then, with a painfully invasive punishment, tonight's loser is the butt of the joke.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Whose Phone Is Ringing?
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr hit a bull's-eye at a clothing store, sabotage each other in a focus group, and the big loser is called upon at a book reading.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Centaur of Attention
programme.desc: The guys go head-to-head in a focus group, and then spread some confusion at a bagel store before heading to the park where they hit all the wrong notes. Finally, tonight's biggest loser gets hunted down during a truly humiliating walk of shame.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Browbeaten
programme.desc: Sal, Q, Murr and Joe take name-calling to new heights, the guys ask for bogus donations, and the night's big loser gets a shave that's too close for comfort.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Drawing a Blank
programme.desc: The guys illustrate their lack of skill as caricature artists in the mall, demonstrate their odd living habits while interviewing for roommates, and try to cut the line for Broadway tickets in Times Square.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Panty Raid
programme.desc: The guys massage beachgoers on the boardwalk, broadcast the news from Times Square, and get their kicks teaching a karate class.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Out of TP
programme.desc: The guys swipe food off other diners' plates at a buffet, tutor students in foreign languages they don't speak, and try to start a dance party in a public park.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Who Arted

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Sound EffeXXX

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Truth Hurts

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Psychotic Not-line

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Out of Fashion
programme.desc: The guys host a taste test with embarrassing survey questions, haggle over priceless pieces of junk at a flea market, and tank as attendants at a gas station.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Scaredy Cat
programme.desc: The guys advertise incompetence to a group of agency executives, are forced into dirty deeds as custodians in a mall food court and tempt their fates by returning to the wheel of doom.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Puncture Perfect

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Clash of the Jokers
programme.desc: In this competitive episode, Sal, Joe, Q and Murr battle head-to-head in fierce joker vs. joker challenges. The guys go two-on-two as they conduct focus groups where they focus mostly on making things uncomfortable.

programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Q and Joe share secrets with shoppers in a grocery store, but when one shopper has a history with Murr, the embarrassment escalates to a whole new level. Then, the guys get creative in an art store.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier - The Frozen Edge: Bear Surge

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier - The Frozen Edge: Cattle in Jeopardy

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier - The Frozen Edge: Gone Fishin'

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier - The Frozen Edge: Protecting the Herd
programme.desc: Jane and Charlotte face bear country to reach an ill cow at the head of the bay and on Perl Island, the family continues their quest to expand the grazing land. Later, Otto surprises Charlotte with an unforgettable gift.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier - The Frozen Edge: Stuck in the Mud

programme.title: The Vet Life: Emergency Engine Cat

programme.title: The Zoo: San Diego: New Day for an Old Tortoise
programme.desc: Hunter the koala is ready for a mate. Jaws the Galápagos tortoise isn't feeling well and the zoo staff works to bring him out of his shell. The Safari Park has not one but two baby giraffe calves that need to be hand-reared simultaneously.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: Rhino Surprise
programme.desc: Rhino Asha is pregnant by partner, Beni. When keepers go home for the night, Asha goes into labour and there's a surprise awaiting them when they arrive at work the next morning.

programme.title: The Zoo: Moving Day
programme.desc: The Zoo's huge male sea lion is in rut, and staff need to move the younger males before he comes territorial. The veterinary team come up with an ingenious solution to repair Dinky the Flamingo's broken ankle. And feeding a rock python proves challenging.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: New Day, New Blood
programme.desc: Tia is short-staffed, but finding a parolee who is prepared for the demands of the job is proving difficult. Then, when Tia hears about a pack of pit bulls running in the street, the team races to the rescue and find an overwhelmed owner.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Second Savior

programme.title: NCIS: Baltimore
programme.desc: After Tony's ex-partner appears to be the latest victim of the Port-to-Port Killer, he revisits his days as a detective in Baltimore.

programme.title: NCIS: Swan Song
programme.desc: After new evidence reveals that the port-to-port killer has infiltrated the agency, the NCIS team chases every lead in a race to track him down.

programme.title: NCIS: Kill Screen
programme.desc: The dismembered fingertips and teeth of a murdered marine are discovered in the stolen purse of a pickpocket, launching NCIS on a mission to find a cold-blooded killer.

programme.title: NCIS: One Last Score
programme.desc: NCIS learns that one of its former investigative assistants, found stabbed to death, was selling details on how to rob a warehouse full of possessions belonging to a woman convicted of fraud. Meanwhile, a new special agent joins the office.

programme.title: NCIS: Out of the Frying Pan...
programme.desc: Gibbs questions Vance's motives when he is asked to interrogate a teenage boy accused of killing his retired marine father.

programme.title: NCIS: Tell-All
programme.desc: NCIS connects a message left in blood by a murdered navy commander to a manuscript that may contain classified military information.

programme.title: NCIS: Two-Faced
programme.desc: To Gibbs' displeasure, Special Agent E.J. Barrett returns to lead the investigation of a seaman's death that may be connected to a series of port-related murders. Meanwhile, Ziva finally introduces her boyfriend to the team.

programme.title: NCIS: Dead Reflection
programme.desc: The NCIS team tracks down a navy lieutenant's killer after a Pentagon security camera reveals a petty officer committing the crime. Meanwhile, Gibbs announces that Agent Barrett and her team will take over the port-to-port serial killer case.

programme.title: The Sinner: Part I
programme.desc: Detective Ambrose investigates a tragic yet suspicious car accident on the outskirts of Dorchester.

programme.title: NCIS: Baltimore
programme.desc: After Tony's ex-partner appears to be the latest victim of the Port-to-Port Killer, he revisits his days as a detective in Baltimore.

programme.title: NCIS: Swan Song
programme.desc: After new evidence reveals that the port-to-port killer has infiltrated the agency, the NCIS team chases every lead in a race to track him down.

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent: Smile
programme.desc: A Park Avenue dentist's murder turns out to be connected to the death of one of his young patients. As detectives look into both deaths, they follow a trail of counterfeit and poisoned mouthwash from the streets of Harlem to the FDA and Wall Street.

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent: Lonelyville
programme.desc: A ménage à trois ends in murder and the only clues the police have to the girl's identity are a pair of emerald earrings.

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent: Depths
programme.desc: The detectives clash with the FBI when they suspect terrorist connections after a diver's body washes up on shore.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Sanctuary
programme.desc: After a female jogger is brutally murdered in the park, Rixton and Atwater arrive to find two suspects fleeing the scene. When the men enter a church, the priest blocks the police from entering the building.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: I Remember Her Now
programme.desc: The body of a young girl is found crushed in an abandoned building after she runs away from a treatment centre for troubled girls. Voight sends Halstead to work undercover inside the centre, where he believes something shady is happening.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Seven Indictments
programme.desc: When a charred body is found in a torched house, Intelligence must work to identify the victim, as well as a young boy who is found badly injured inside. As they work towards identifying the victim, they uncover a web of secrets and lies.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Favor, Affection, Malice or Ill-Will
programme.desc: When Lindsay is tipped off about a grieving father looking to avenge his daughter's death, Olinsky goes undercover as a hitman-for-hire. Meanwhile, Ruzek comes back after finishing his undercover assignment, only to have Voight knock him down to patrol.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Emotional Proximity
programme.desc: Olinsky's daughter remains in critical condition following a massive fire, leaving Intelligence on edge, but more determined than ever to track down the suspect.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Remember the Devil
programme.desc: After being tipped off about a woman running barefoot through the woods, Intelligence is led to a kidnapping victim locked up in a shipping container.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: A Little Bit of Light
programme.desc: When Chicago's 'Nightcrawler' Bobby Trent is murdered over a single piece of footage, Intelligence must investigate one of Chicago's wealthiest families, uncovering a lineage of old money and secrets.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Last Minute Resistance
programme.desc: After encouraging her sister to spend a night out with friends, Burgess wakes up to find that Nicole never made it home. As the guilt begins to eat at Burgess, the team in Intelligence bands together to find Nicole.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Grasping for Salvation
programme.desc: While investigating the murder of a teenage boy, Voight finds a connection to an old case. The victim's father, a prominent defense attorney, tries to get the case taken over by Area Central Homicide.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Fagin
programme.desc: The team is called to an in-progress bank robbery and find a detective trying to take over the crime scene. As the robberies continue to be executed around the city, Lindsay is forced to make a decision in the heat of the moment.

programme.title: Movie: The Boss
programme.desc: A wealthy business mogul is sent to prison for insider trading, and upon her release, she's broke, homeless and hated by almost everyone. She turns to her assistant in her time of need in hopes of re-establishing her wealth and changing her ways.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Homer Simpson in: 'Kidney Trouble'

programme.title: The '80s: The Decade That Made Us: The Revolutionaries

programme.title: The '80s: The Decade That Made Us: Tear Down These Walls
programme.desc: Though the 1980s were known for its 'greed is good' mantra, the decade also saw its fair share of literal and cultural walls brought down, as Americans united on political, racial and health issues.

programme.title: The '80s: The Decade That Made Us: Super Power
programme.desc: At the end of the 1980s American pop culture goes global and helps bring down the Iron Curtain, leaving America as the world's sole superpower.

programme.title: Dr. K's Exotic Animal ER: Gloves Off!: The Great Snake Escape
programme.desc: A possibly pregnant boa escapes, a squirrel travels from Texas, and Dr. K’s rabbits aren’t playing nice.

programme.title: Dr. K's Exotic Animal ER: Gloves Off!: Shell of a Problem
programme.desc: A squirrel gets aggressive, Dr. K wrestles a pig, and the whole team fights to save a tortoise.

programme.title: Dr. K's Exotic Animal ER: Hubble Trouble
programme.desc: Hubble, a crested gecko, comes rushing into the clinic after being attacked by the family dog.

programme.title: Dr. K's Exotic Animal ER: Pain in the Beak
programme.desc: Dr. T and Dyanne are called out to a nature center to examine a male peacock.

programme.title: Dr. K's Exotic Animal ER: Prairie Dog Companion
programme.desc: A prairie dog comes in for an examination after he mysteriously lost his top teeth.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Dr. Pol's Super Bowl
programme.desc: Charlie, the tiny pony, captures Dr. Pol's heart.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: License to Chill
programme.desc: This week, an ice storm causes PVS to close early for one of the first times ever.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Danes of Our Lives
programme.desc: The Pol Vet Crew is working overtime on some of their most challenging situations.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Little Pol Peep
programme.desc: The doctors deal with an aggressive bovine and a mini horse.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: The Devil's Mutant
programme.desc: In Egypt, a freakish animal is caught on camera, and using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate if this strange beast could explain the secrets of a satanic deity that was once believed to have been worshiped here.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: The Skinwalker Awakens
programme.desc: Evidence of a man transforming into an animal is caught on camera on a Native American reservation in Utah, leading some experts ask if it's proof of a Skinwalker, a legendary evil creature that can shapeshift into a deadly beast.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Doomsday Volcano NYC
programme.desc: A massive plume of smoke suddenly erupts from the ground in Manhattan, and experts investigate if this terrifying event is evidence of a volcano waking up beneath the streets of New York City and if it's almost due to blow.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Return of the Witch
programme.desc: When something strange is recorded flying in Mexico, some wonder if it's a witch reputed to kidnap children, and others believe it's evidence of a new way to smuggle drugs or a top-secret technology.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Mysteries of the Gas Giants
programme.desc: Cutting-edge NASA missions to Saturn and Jupiter are giving experts new evidence to solve the great mysteries of these alien worlds. Using the latest science, they're making discoveries that challenge everything we know about the gas giants.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Starman
programme.desc: Some day life on Earth will be made impossible due to a cosmic disaster. In order for humanity to survive, we nee to find a new home among the stars. Science is already exploring ways to take us there.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Saturn
programme.desc: Saturn's secrets are out. The ferocious weather, the evolving ring system and the discovery of active geology on Saturn's moons has rewritten the textbooks. Scientists are looking for life on Saturn's moons and they may have found it on Titan.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Cassini's Final Secrets
programme.desc: For twenty years, NASA's Cassini spacecraft revealed the strange secrets of Saturn until it vaporized in its atmosphere in a blaze of glory. Today its legacy lives on, as fresh data from the probe helps scientists make brand-new discoveries.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Starman
programme.desc: Some day life on Earth will be made impossible due to a cosmic disaster. In order for humanity to survive, we nee to find a new home among the stars. Science is already exploring ways to take us there.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: When NASA Met Jupiter
programme.desc: NASA's Juno spacecraft is part of a cutting-edge mission to explore the mysteries of Jupiter. As this mighty probe is pummeled with deadly radiation, it gathers new data that could change everything we know about the solar system's biggest planet.

programme.title: Hawking and Einstein: Unlocking the Universe
programme.desc: Albert Einstein and Stephen Hawking were revolutionary thinkers who changed everything we know about our universe, and using the latest discoveries, experts explore the connections between these two great minds.

programme.title: The Truth Behind the Moon Landing: Conspiracy of the Lost Tapes
programme.desc: Experts use cutting-edge tech to hunt for the lost NASA tapes that recorded the Apollo 11 moon landing and shed light on a possible conspiracy, as some believe their disappearance is part of a cover-up to hide the truth.

programme.title: The Truth Behind the Moon Landing: CIA's Secret Space War
programme.desc: Confidential CIA files reveal a top-secret war for space between the US and the Soviets, and a team of experts investigate if new discoveries about American espionage during the Apollo program provide evidence of a conspiracy to fake the moon landing.

programme.title: The Truth Behind the Moon Landing: The Hollywood Conspiracy
programme.desc: Some believe that the moon's waving American flag is the smoking gun that NASA faked the moon landing, and as a team of experts investigate this strange piece of evidence, the trail leads all the way to some of Hollywood's biggest names.

programme.title: The Truth Behind the Moon Landing: Killing Armstrong
programme.desc: Apollo 11's lunar module nearly killed Neil Armstrong during training, and some believe this close-call could explain a conspiracy to fake the moon landing. A team of experts investigate if dangers that the Apollo 11 crew faced were motive for a cover-up.

programme.title: The Truth Behind the Moon Landing: NASA Nazi Conspiracy
programme.desc: One of America's greatest achievements is also one of its most controversial, and now, a team of experts investigate if there was a conspiracy to fake the moon landing, uncovering a secret report on hundreds of Nazis' involved in the Apollo space program.

programme.title: Mission Declassified: Boston's Unsolved Art Heist
programme.desc: Christof investigates the robbery of the Isabella Stewart Gardner Museum, the largest art heist in history. In pursuit of the stolen masterpieces, he follows leads from dangerous members of organized crime that take him from Boston to Florida and France.

programme.title: Mission Declassified: Butch Cassidy's Buried Secrets
programme.desc: Christof uncovers new clues about the true fate of outlaws Butch Cassidy and the Sundance Kid. He travels to the highlands of Bolivia and the mountains of Utah to dig up evidence that may finally solve this 100-year-old mystery.

programme.title: Mission Declassified: The Lindbergh Kidnapping
programme.desc: Christof investigates the Lindbergh kidnapping, a story that made his grandfather's journalism career. Now, using his grandfather's notes and recently declassified FBI files, Christof tracks down surprising new leads to Germany and even the Nazi Party.

programme.title: Mission Declassified: The Lost Treasure of Dutch Schultz
programme.desc: Christof joins the decades-long hunt for the buried millions of notorious gangster Dutch Schultz. Armed with rare documents and cutting-edge tech, Christof follows the fugitive mob boss's trail from Saratoga Springs, New York, to Miami, Florida.

programme.title: Mission Declassified: The Hunt for D.B. Cooper
programme.desc: Christof jumps from a plane and digs up rare FBI files as he follows shocking new leads that take him from the Pacific Northwest to Las Vegas and Utah in his quest to find the real identity of hijacker D.B. Cooper.

programme.title: Dallas SWAT
programme.desc: The SWAT team responds to a dangerous call out: a man has barricaded himself in his apartment and is shooting multiple rounds aimlessly out the window. Trapped on the scene are a number of patrol officers who Rich Emberlin and his squad must rescue.

programme.title: Dallas SWAT
programme.desc: SWAT team negotiator Jake Byas faces the toughest challenge of his career: dealing with an armed murder suspect barricaded on a ledge who's threatening to kill himself and anyone who tries to get him down; another team surrounds the home of a drug dealer.

programme.title: The Big House: Parchman
programme.desc: Originally a slave plantation ruled by the whip, today Parchman's most important crop is neither food nor cotton, but prisoners.

programme.title: The Big House: Florida State at Raiford
programme.desc: Built on farmland, 'The Rock' was infamous as the site of stabbings and a decapitation.

programme.title: Nightwatch: The End Is Just the Beginning
programme.desc: From gunshot victims to seizures to a moped rider playing Pokémon Go, EMT's see everything on one more busy night before they can celebrate the end of the summer.

programme.title: Nightwatch Nation: Racing the Clock
programme.desc: In Baton Rouge, a brawl erupts in the back of Meghan and Dee's ambulance when an overdose patient wakes up swinging. Meanwhile, Ariel and Cunningham fear the worst as they rush to the scene of a flaming motorcycle wreck in Yonkers.

programme.title: Fugitive Chronicles: Darli
programme.desc: An incredible international manhunt ensues when a player in Miami's drug world goes on the lam.

programme.title: Fugitive Chronicles: Danny Ray Horning
programme.desc: Horning goes to the one place he thinks he'll never be found, the Grand Canyon. Living off the land, he evades capture in the longest and largest manhunt in Arizona state history.

programme.title: Female Forces: Ready to Rumble
programme.desc: The women of Naperville PD show just how tough they are as they combat out of control suspects including a kid who tries to charge one of the officers and a mother with a violent daughter seeking advice.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Curtain Call to Hell
programme.desc: Stephanie and Daniel are young, in love, and happily balancing work and play. But before long, tensions are set off by disappointment, self-loathing, and a mutual affection for the bottle. And by the final curtain call, only one of them is left standing.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Deadly Obsession
programme.desc: Tom and Lynette's love story spans decades from grade school to a posh house with a pool. But dark secrets from the bedroom bleed out onto other aspects of the marriage... and a dangerous obsession rips their romance into pieces.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Death Knows No Borders
programme.desc: Worlds collide when Donald and Umi fall in love in Indonesia. But as Umi strives to become the perfect American woman in Don's native Kentucky, he longs for something or someone more exotic and when this unorthodox family is divided only one can conquer.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Rookie Mistake
programme.desc: Carli wants to be a cop instead, she marries one. And Jeff takes his role as protector a little more seriously than fun-loving Carli can handle. Her attempts to break free from the confines of wedlock sets off a chain of deadly events.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Honkytonk Killer
programme.desc: Shorty and Cotton seem perfect for each other, they love dancing, motorcycles and each other. But looks can be deceiving, and after a tragic accident reveals a life of lies and deceit, one of them will ultimately dance with the devil to the death.

programme.title: Twisted Love: Love and Hot Lead
programme.desc: Two 18-year-old girls fall head over heels for each other, but when a 49-year-old man decides to come between them, bullets start to fly.

programme.title: Stranger Among Us: Homicide on the Rails
programme.desc: A spring break adventure turns deadly when a college student infiltrates a community of train hoppers.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: The Girl in the Window
programme.desc: Lisa Bradford lives a quiet, country life in Arkansas with her husband Dennis and their two young kids. Their love story takes a devastating turn when they get a visit from police, unveiling a double life of crime so heinous it rips the marriage apart.

programme.title: Kiss of Death: Blood Never Lies
programme.desc: Mario is a seasoned EMT when he meets Gina who works in the ER. Sparks fly and soon, the couple are married and living the life of luxury. But, after many years pass, the only way to keep up with the Joneses is bloody murder.

programme.title: I'd Kill for You: Agent of Death
programme.desc: Vern Holbrook's real estate firm is one of Yakima, Washington's most successful businesses. But this family patriarch has problems: a stepson whose marriage is crumbling, and a business deal that's going sour. Devastating tragedy looms.

programme.title: I'd Kill for You: First to Die
programme.desc: A shotgun wedding leaves naval officers John Marmo and Rebecca Braswell in a troubled marriage with a baby. As the relationship crumbles, allegations of infidelity and abuse run rampant. A fierce custody battle pushes both sides in a deadly battle.

programme.title: I'd Kill for You: Murder in Stereo
programme.desc: When millionaire Werner Hartmann meets Debra Stover he's smitten and soon marries the young beauty. But their romance becomes a roller coaster when a young tennis pro enters the picture. Soon a deadly plan unfolds into a nearly perfect murder.

programme.title: I'd Kill for You: To Have and To Kill
programme.desc: After young lovers Deborah and Steven Brown are married, his erratic and malicious side emerges to torment his wife and their kids for the next 16 years. But trying to escape Steven's wrath proves treacherous for Deborah, and those willing to help.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: A Deadly Divorce
programme.desc: An illicit affair between a bank executive and his secretary turns deadly when the soon-to-be ex-wife uncovers their romance.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: Onward, Christian Soldier
programme.desc: While her husband serves in the army, a lonely married mother of three finds comfort in the arms of her church's charismatic new minister. But danger looms in the form of a jealous love-rival that will stop at nothing to scare her away.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: Love Locked Up
programme.desc: A single mom looking for a fresh start takes a job as a prison nurse. An encounter with an inmate leads to an illicit love affair. But their relationship is strictly forbidden and when it is discovered the pair take drastic action to stay together.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: Together Forever, Forever Together
programme.desc: A young teen forbidden to date falls in love with a senior at her high school. The two go to extreme lengths to keep their relationship secret but when it is threatened with exposure they vow to stay together, whatever the cost.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: Laws of Attraction
programme.desc: A high-flying attorney and one of his clients embark on an illicit affair. His infatuation leads to obsession and when their secret affair is revealed, the laws of attraction prove fatal.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: An Affair to Forget
programme.desc: A young college student embarks on a secret affair with a police officer.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: To Love, Honor, and Kill
programme.desc: Noor and Marwan, young Iraqi American teens from feuding households, fall in love despite Noor's family's opposition.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Fallujah
programme.desc: Fallujah, Iraq's most volatile city, has become a haven for radical Muslim fighters from around the world. To root them out, the U.S. military unleashes Operation Phantom Fury. Soldiers and Marines engage the enemy in brutal urban combat.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Road to Baghdad

programme.desc: A hula instructor and drum maker are looking to build a yurt on their Oahu property. Rain and mud slows the build down, and Nathan and Jenny fight against the clock and the elements to complete the yurt on time.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Multi-Family Affair
programme.desc: Chase and the team have their hands full trying to repair and restore this diamond in the rough that's only accessible by hiking or by boating across the lake.

programme.desc: Chase Morrill and his team help a DIY homeowner jumpstart his project and renovate with kids in mind. With a budget of $30,000 and a July 1st deadline, the masters are going to have to use their imagination on this one.

programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: A House Built on Sand
programme.desc: A couple's beach cottage in Dewey, Delaware, is just a few steps to the beach, but the house has no curb appeal and feels dated. They enlist Marnie to give it a face lift, but during demolition, Marnie finds that the foundation is sinking into the sand.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: No Longer Grandma's House
programme.desc: After inheriting his family's Cape Cod cottage in Bethany Beach, Delaware, a man realizes it looks like grandma still lives in the home. Marnie plans to bring the house up to date by ripping out the old wood paneling and more.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Big Beach Dreams
programme.desc: Marnie's friend Leslie has achieved her dream of buying a beautiful house on the beach, but it needs a lot of work. Now she needs Marnie's help to turn it into the beach home and entertaining hub she's always dreamed about.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Sun Room to Fun Room
programme.desc: After years of pleading from their daughters, this couple has agreed to renovate their 90s themed house. Now it's up to Marnie to bring their house into the 21st century and make it comfortable enough for three generations.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Bethany Beach Bunks
programme.desc: A family with a new baby is bursting out of their cramped bungalow in Bethany Beach, Delaware. Marnie creates more space for the family by opening up the kitchen, relocating a laundry room and building magical bunk beds to accommodate the children.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Seaside Spectacular
programme.desc: A family living in their dream location of Bethany Beach, DE, calls on Marnie to save their cramped 1980s beach house. Marnie's mission is to drag it into the present with a nautical makeover and make it look as beautiful as the beaches around it.

programme.title: Behind the Build: HGTV Dream Home
programme.desc: Go behind the build to see how the HGTV Dream Home 2020 comes together from the ground up. This spectacular home is designed with outdoor living in mind on Hilton Head Island, South Carolina, in one of the island's most sought after communities.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Kitschy Kitchen
programme.desc: Nicole tackles her grandparents' kitchen. Built in 1956, the kitchen has been around for over half a century, but was redone in the '90s, eliminating its mid-century modern charm. Nicole wants to restore the kitchen to how it looked when she was a child.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Pool Room Refresher
programme.desc: For Nicole's next project, it's gonna be sink or swim! The indoor pool that Nicole's grandfather built by hand is getting a much-needed refresher. First up, the safety and mechanical systems of the pool need to be overhauled.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: All About Family
programme.desc: Off the pool lies a dated family room, covered in wood paneling and boasting a large mechanical room for the pool equipment. Nicole sees opportunity for a beautiful bathroom, and an updated, retro family room.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Mid-Century Bathroom Remade
programme.desc: Nicole Curtis saves the original Mid-Century bathroom in her grandparents' house in her classic style; by preserving critical elements while updating tired design choices.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Apartment Refresh
programme.desc: Nicole's grandparents' house sits on a sprawling five-acre parcel and has an apartment. Taking a break from the main house renovation, Nicole tackles the apartment with a series of fun, chic changes that don't cost a fortune.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: The Hearts of the Home
programme.desc: Nicole Curtis tackles the heart of her Grandparents' home, the living room and dining room. The most 'photographed' rooms in the house, these projects present Nicole with a very clear visual template to work from.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Mid-Century Bedroom Revival
programme.desc: Nicole Curtis tackles one of her biggest challenges yet. She tackles all of the original bedrooms in the home built by her grandparents. The previous owners trashed the original and design, now it's up to her to fix their mistakes.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Reclaiming the Rec Room
programme.desc: Nicole tackles the basement. With space at a premium, Nicole must battle water, structural problems, dilapidated windows, and poorly placed duct work to turn a neglected area into a much needed gathering space.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: The Basement Reborn
programme.desc: After an improperly winterized basement bathroom springs some serious leaks, Nicole remains determined to rebuild the bathroom better than ever. She also adds an egress window to the basement and builds out a basement guest suite.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: One Extraordinary Exterior
programme.desc: Nicole adds gutters, a new driveway and entirely does the house in stucco like the original. To complete this magnificent transformation Nicole restores the original brick front porch and tops everything off with some tasteful, but stunning landscaping.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Southern Treats
programme.desc: Host Noah Cappe samples Southern hospitality on fairgrounds across the county. The carnival treats he finds are all infused with a down-home goodness that makes each bite taste like Southern sugar and spice.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Bayou Bites
programme.desc: Down in Texas and Louisiana, the bayou fairgrounds are full of rich and tasty food.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Gordita, Pray, Love
programme.desc: Noah Cappe hits the jackpot with midway eats, like the onion ring nacho supreme and cosmic funnel cake, at the Pasco County Fair in Florida. Later, he decks the halls and grabs a bite or two at the sights and sounds of Christmas in San Marcos, Texas.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Rowdy with a Chance of Meatballs
programme.desc: Noah Cappe hits the Arkansas State Fair in Little Rock to discover a few brand-new favourites. In addition to the eponymous Arkanstick and rolled ice-cream treat known as the Rainbow Roll there are also deep-fried Pina Coladas.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Des Moines, IA
programme.desc: Casey heads to Des Moines, Iowa, where he'll attempt to eat an overstuffed pulled pork sandwich slathered in a scorpion pepper hot sauce in ten minutes.

programme.title: Man v. Food: San Antonio, TX
programme.desc: Casey Webb's tasty travels take him to San Antonio, Texas. His first stop is San Antonio's oldest restaurant- a German deli- for the Wienerschnitzel.

programme.title: Man v. Food: New York, NY
programme.desc: Casey travels to New York City for the best in big city eats, including an insane challenge that has him choosing between a 151-ounce milkshake, an eight-pound sloppy joe or six habanero ghost chili wings.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Sleepy Hollow, NY
programme.desc: Casey visits spooky Sleepy Hollow, New York, where he tries the massive headless horseman burger and takes on the Dawg House challenge in which a roll of the dice chooses twelve insanely topped hot dogs that he must eat in under 30 minutes.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: On a Date
programme.desc: Birds are chirping, flowers are blooming, bellies are full and love is in the air. Celebrate the best meals for any romantic occasion. Alex Guarnaschelli wines and dines with the most amazing gnocchi ever made in New York City.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Chocolate Bliss
programme.desc: When it comes to chocolate, the possibilities for sweet treats are endless. On the ultimate list of the best chocolate treats in America, Ali Khan devours an unbelievable Dark Truffle Cake from San Antonio, Texas.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Buttered Up
programme.desc: Chefs and food experts are revealing the richest, creamiest buttery dishes out there. Alex Guarnaschelli brings on the butter with a one-of-a-kind shrimp-and-grits combo from Tillie's in Short Hills, New Jersey.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Stretchy Pants Required
programme.desc: America's best dishes just might burst your buttons. Anne Burrell faces off against a gut-busting club sandwich from Little Goat Diner in Chicago while Antonia Lofaso ventures to the heart of Los Angeles for heavy-hitting Korean barbecue at Park's BBQ.

programme.title: Good Eats: My Shakshuka
programme.desc: Alton Brown takes a deep dive on one of the most internet-famous dishes of the decade by way of a famous film from the 1940s. Along the way, Alton talks through preserved lemons and homemade harissa.

programme.title: Good Eats: Cubing Around
programme.desc: AB makes good use of the only meat capable of being knitted together.

programme.title: Good Eats: Oh My, Meat Pie
programme.desc: Alton Brown tells the tale of an ancestor's journey to the New World by way of a curious meat pie shop. He explores the origins and preparation of shepherd's pie and mincemeat.

programme.title: Good Eats: Tamale Never Dies
programme.desc: Alton embarks on a historical and tasty exploration of tamales, which are quite possibly the original convenience food.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: On a Date

programme.desc: When a gas station/ convenience store employee is found shot at point blank range, investigators find the entire murder has been caught on the store's videotape security camera.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Freeze Framed
programme.desc: An apparent suicide turns out to be a much more menacing scenario involving a black widow.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Touch of Evil
programme.desc: A dismembered body is dumped on the side of the New Jersey Turnpike and before police realize it, bodies are turning up between two states. A serial killer emerges, targeting Manhattan's gay community.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Church Disappearance
programme.desc: When a girl disappears from church, investigators fear a stalker is preying on children.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Photo Finish
programme.desc: A beautiful model goes missing and no one has a clue to her whereabouts until a park employee discovers photographs in a trash dumpster. With the photos are some vital pieces of information which eventually lead to a professional photographer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Where the Blood Drops
programme.desc: This is the story of a woman convicted of her husband's murder, whose son was so convinced of her innocence that he enrolled in law school.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bagging a Killer
programme.desc: Police use satellites to trace the kidnapper of a nine-year-old girl. After questioning whether the girl's long lost mother was somehow involved, the satellite tracking reveals who the kidnapper is, where they took her, and why.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Double Trouble
programme.desc: A Maine State Trooper is attacked during a routine stop which triggers a chain of events that jump starts a stalled murder case hundreds of miles away.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Paintball

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shadow of a Doubt
programme.desc: An unknown assailant walked into a retail store and fired three shots, killing the owner. Police had suspects, but all of them had alibis.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Treading Not So Lightly
programme.desc: When a four-year-old girl is found unconscious in a parking lot, police concluded it was a hit and run vehicle accident, and left it at that. But the girl's mother was determined to find out exactly what had happened.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Forever Hold Your Peace
programme.desc: When a young man confessed to the rape and murder of a woman in a restaurant, police were convinced the case was solved. Eight years later, another man imprisoned for an unrelated crime, admitted he committed the murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bio-Attack

programme.desc: A woman is found dead of a gunshot wound and police conclude that she was murdered by her husband. Forensic scientists were able to piece together the clues and determine what really happened.

programme.title: Mom: A Catheter and a Dipsy-Doodle

programme.title: Full House: Little Shop of Sweaters

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Driven to Tears/ Rule of Dumb

America's Top Dog: Double Down on the Underdog
programme.desc: This time, not one, but two civilian underdogs take on the professional pooches in an epic clash of K9s.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Kill the Centaur
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q get ballsy while posing as salesmen, and then try to outdo each other as they invade the personal space of confused strangers. Tonight's loser is up against the ropes, playing dress-up for an unruly arena.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Captain Fatbelly
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q lend an unhelpful hand while working at a high-tech store, then play detectives at the mall in search of perps on the loose. Tonight's loser gets the shakes while soaring high above the city.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Sneaking Number Twos, Going Number One
programme.desc: The guys play a game of 'put-pocket' at a grocery store, then get jumpy at the park after taking each other's cell phones. Plus, tonight's biggest loser learns that when you gotta go, you gotta go.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Blind Justice
programme.desc: The guys get a little punchy while giving boxing lessons, then head to the mall to share the gift of music with strangers. When tonight’s loser delivers the right speech to the wrong audience, he’s the one who gets scared straight.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Needy and the Greedy
programme.desc: The guys have fast fingers at a focus group and leave no cereal box unturned at the grocery store. Then, tonight's big loser opens a can of something fierce at a local donation center.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Washed Up
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr rat each other out at a pizza place and get into textual relationships with strangers at the mall. Then, the big loser twerks hard for the money at an impromptu bikini car wash.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: To Hatch a Predator
programme.desc: The Jokers perform unusual methods of DNA testing and get too close for comfort at the grocery store. Then, tonight's big loser becomes a shell of a man after he cracks under pressure during a presentation at a children's museum.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Like a Boss
programme.desc: The jokers act fast and furiously as employees at a theme park and go postal on model citizens who don't realize they're part of the picture. Then, tonight's big loser tumbles and falls after antagonizing a room full of Guy Fieri fans.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Chick Magnet
programme.desc: The guys turn on the charm to make a restaurant basement sound enticing and recruit unsuspecting shoppers to shout out bizarre nicknames. Then, tonight's big loser must find his way out of the cuckoo's nest before the chicks get crazy.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dropping Knowledge
programme.desc: The guys pump the breaks on a bike ride to ask perplexed strangers for help and cut the java line to get the go-ahead on some very strange emails. Plus, tonight's big loser gets schooled in a game show that barely makes the grade.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Hump Day
programme.desc: The guys geek out while lending a hand to customers at a casual restaurant, then battle across the table of a focus group. Plus, tonight's big loser gets spitting mad when forced to spend some quality time at the zoo.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Out of Left Field
programme.desc: The guys try not to crack up during a four-way face off and later find that a stroll with the Gatto pups is no walk in the park. Plus, tonight's big loser suffers more than muscle failure in a major league embarrassment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Off the Reservation
programme.desc: Murr, Q, Joe and Sal participate in a fake documentary, then find themselves in the middle of a marshmallow throwing contest. Plus, tonight's big loser is the host with the least when he can't find customers' dinner reservations.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Fraudway
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr one-up each other while trying not to laugh, and team up for a lunch that’s for the birds. Later, tonight’s big loser hits the Broadway stage, where he’s treated to a classic New York welcome by an agitated crowd.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Show Stopper
programme.desc: Sal, Q, Joe and Murr are at Universal Studios in Hollywood. They start off serving up ridiculous surveys, then make things awkward while posing as maintenance workers. Plus, tonight’s big loser can't catch a break…no matter how many times he tries.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Sucks for You
programme.desc: Sal, Q, Joe and Murr bus their way through Katz’s Deli, then express some unpopular opinions at the park. Plus, tonight’s big loser must talk his way through some real highs and lows, in a punishment that truly sucks.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Universal Appeal
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Murr and Joe invade Orlando. The guys are out of line managing a ride at a theme park, get all wet on a river adventure, and man the (mis)information booth. Plus, tonight's loser goes from spider hero to barnyard zero.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Paradise Lost
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q say aloha from Hawaii. Tonight, see why it's blood in the water for tonight's big loser, who swims with the fishes after too many fails.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Mime and Punishment
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q put the nasty in namaste when they lead guided meditations. Tonight's big loser gets boxed in with a 24-hour punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Three Men and Your Baby
programme.desc: Sal, Joe, Murr, and Q get snap happy posing as photographers, and all but one of the guys are faced with a punishment that's not child's play.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Coward
programme.desc: The guys show who's boss at a fast food joint and whisper sweet nothings at a grocery store. Then, the big loser helps a cow in labor, and almost buys the farm.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Virtual Insanity
programme.desc: The guys bark up the wrong tree at a pet store, and tonight’s big loser virtually loses his mind after entering a world he’s never visited before.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Laundry Day
programme.desc: The guys look for partners in crime at a supermarket and throw caution to the wind as helpless romantics. Plus, tonight’s loser has a serious wardrobe malfunction.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Water Torture
programme.desc: The guys spin a wheel and creep out shoppers at the mall. And tonight's punishment leaves one Joker soaked, enraged, and totally shocked.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Hitting the Wrong Note
programme.desc: The guys dress to the nines, but act like zeroes while trying to get sympathy, and tonight's big loser faces the music in a tone-deaf punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Heckle and Hide
programme.desc: The guys ask strangers for a little help with big items at the grocery store, and give entrepreneurial tips to some unfortunate souls. Plus, tonight's big loser strikes out at a little league softball game while posing as 'that dad.'

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: A Loser Presents
programme.desc: The guys return to White Castle to serve up a new round of mischief, pose as bouncers at a nightclub, and offer phony horoscope readings in a mall.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: What Did I Eat?
programme.desc: The guys try to sell diamonds to unsuspecting couples ready to tie the knot, and pose as members of a very unwelcoming committee down at the boardwalk.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Starfart Macchiato
programme.desc: The guys share humiliating text messages in a quiet waiting room, shampoo women's hair at an upscale hair salon, and teach a driver's ed course that's a guaranteed fail.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Bellydancer
programme.desc: The guys put their green thumbs to the test as workers in a garden center, demonstrate how NOT to save lives as CPR instructors, and work a deli counter.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Joker vs. Joker
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr, and Q face off in special Joker versus Joker challenges. They try their hands at giving palm readings, manicures, and much more in a humiliating quest to avoid facing the ultimate punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Down in the Dump
programme.desc: The guys lose sight of social etiquette with strangers in the park, present disastrous timeshare opportunities to future vacationers, and get sneaky with people’s pockets in the grocery store.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Human Pinata
programme.desc: The guys hug it out with strangers in the park, go head-to-head pitching wacky inventions to confused consumers, and launch a manhunt for their imaginary wives.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Sweat the Small Things
programme.desc: Teaching an art class never looked so, bad. A dartboard and a home invasion have the contestants stressed and competitive.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Film Fail
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q, and Murr are forced to think on their feet at a podiatrist’s office, ask strangers for help burying unusual items in the park, and keep their eyes on the prize in a grocery store race.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Not Safe for Work
programme.desc: Timing is everything in comedy. The contestants test their comedy on unsuspecting strangers; teach office staff about proper safety techniques and test their luck with online dating profiles.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Alliance
programme.desc: The Jokers are challenged to hold in their laughter during presentations designed to crack them up. Plus, when Joe, Sal, and Murr try to gang up on Q, he turns the tables.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Tooth and Consequences
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q spread the love as attendants in a bridal dress shop much to the dismay of the brides-to-be, and break a sacred guy-code in the process. Plus, they attempt to sway frightened focus groups with fragrance campaigns that stink.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Fe-mail
programme.desc: It's spa day for the Jokers, although for them it's anything but relaxing. Then, at the park, Sal reveals his secret identity while discussing the birds and bees of dolphins. Plus, the big loser finds himself a little overdressed.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Lost Boy
programme.desc: Joe, Murr, Sal and Q network their way into some very uncomfortable business conversations, and go head to head in a photography presentation that's anything but picture perfect.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Up Loser's Creek
programme.desc: The jokers make some tough calls at a telemarketing agency that leaves everyone wondering if they're just phoning it in. Then, the guys' intentions get wishy-washy at a fountain in the mall. Plus, Q and Sal tap into their spiritual side down at the shore.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: In Poor Taste Buds
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr take to the court to serve up some seriously personal tennis lessons and then head to the park for a bewildering game of Now! The loser must put his face through the ultimate test during a food presentation.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Permanent Punishment
programme.desc: Q, Murr, Sal, and Joe provide a false sense of security to some sassy shoppers at a drug store, and the competition reaches new heights during a rematch of their balloon challenge in the grocery store.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Parks and Wreck!
programme.desc: The guys cannonball into an uncomfortable poolside encounter and convince strangers to press send on their absurd e-mails. The loser presents a shocking senior citizen initiative to a community planning board.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Tied and Feathered
programme.desc: The guys teach a crash course in sorry behaviour, ask strangers to settle bizarre debates and spread surprisingly good news at the mall. Plus, tonight’s loser has his hands tied when a day at the park turns into a frightful mess.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Smushed
programme.desc: Joe, Q, Sal and Murr give a security presentation that’s anything but safe, then hold hands with strangers in the park.

programme.title: Botched: Breast Lumps and Empty Noses
programme.desc: Dr. Nassif pulls out all the stops to help a woman headbutted by a bulldog and who is now missing the inside of her nose, while Dr. Dubrow must remove a breast lump in hopes of stopping a leaking nipple.

programme.title: Botched: Magical Mystery Breasts
programme.desc: A rare inflammatory disease brings a woman to the doctors for advice. A patient longs for the abs he can't seem to naturally acquire. An overseas client hopes for a boob job, having survived a near-death experience in the operating room.

programme.title: Botched: Surgically Enhanced: Face Misfor-CHIN

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Birthdays and Bad News Part 1

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Birthdays and Bad News Part 2
programme.desc: After an uncomfortable confrontation with her ex at True's first birthday, Khloe must figure out how to coexist with her ex for her daughter's sake.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Cruel and Unusual Punishment
programme.desc: Kourtney and Scott approach the family for parenting advice, but some unwelcome input from Corey leads to a blowout argument between him and Scott. Khloe plans a wine-tasting trip to Napa to see how Kylie is handling significant life changes.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Three's Company
programme.desc: Scott feels pressure to make sure both Kourtney and his girlfriend Sofia are happy on a family trip to Finland. When North gets an opportunity to star in a video with one of her idols, Kim worries that her daughter will have performance anxiety.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Have You Met Kim?
programme.desc: Kim gives the world an intimate look into the busiest week of her life as she prepared for the birth of her fourth baby, stars in a music video with Paris Hilton, and heads to the Met Gala. Kourtney finds out someone is stealing from her.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Psalm West
programme.desc: After the birth of her son Psalm, Kim plans a surprise vow renewal ceremony for her husband to celebrate five years of marriage. When Kourtney's friends can't get along on a girl’s trip to Turks and Caicos, she must assert herself.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Ex-Factor
programme.desc: When Khloe's ex-husband Lamar releases a memoir that includes details about their relationship, she considers reconnecting with him for the first time in years. After an old rumour resurfaces, Kris worries that it will spark a fight between her and Khloe.

programme.title: E! News
programme.desc: The biggest and most talked about stories of the day in pop culture.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Patriarch of Perfection
programme.desc: Meet the Chrisley family, where Todd Chrisley is king. He micromanages his family just like his business and always tries to stay five steps ahead of his five children.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Not So Sweet Sixteen
programme.desc: Savannah is turning sweet 16, and a big birthday bash is in the works. Todd has to come to grips with the fact that his little girl is growing into a young woman. At the party, Todd keeps a watchful eye on girl-crazy Chase.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Jugs and Ammo
programme.desc: Todd’s eldest daughter Lindsie broke his heart when she eloped with her now-husband, Will, without telling her family. While Lindsie recovers from plastic surgery, Todd and Will make an effort to find some common ground at the shooting range.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Two Men and a Baby
programme.desc: The Chrisleys welcome a new addition to the family: Baby Chloe. Chloe is Kyle's daughter, and she is coming to live with Todd and Julie while they teach Kyle 'Parenting 101.' Savannah and Chase get into a fender bender in Savannah's new car.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Todd-Tervention
programme.desc: The Chrisley's are off to their South Carolina lake house in celebration of Todd's mother, Faye's, birthday. To his kids' dismay, Todd confiscates all electronic devices to ensure a weekend of real family bonding.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Big Apple Blowup
programme.desc: Todd takes Savannah and Chase to New York City to teach them about the family fashion business. Savannah proves to be a perfect student, but the only thing Chase learns is how to pick up models.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Date Night
programme.desc: The Chrisley kids show their love for their parents by treating them to a special day of pampering and a romantic dinner, but planning isn't the kids' strong suit. What starts off with good intentions ends up in a comedy of errors.

programme.title: Pop of the Morning

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Hey Chloe, It's Your Birthday!
programme.desc: Todd bets Julie he can throw just as fabulous a birthday party for Chloe as she could. The bet is on, but Todd has to do it all on his own. He soon realizes that planning cupcakes and a petting zoo is not as easy as Julie makes it look.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Rules for Dating My Teenage Daughter
programme.desc: When Julie announces she's going back to work, Todd must transform into Mr. Mom and take over the household duties. Meanwhile, Savannah feels like she's ready to start dating and pleads her case to go out with a 19-year-old American Idol.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Misadventures in Babysitting
programme.desc: Todd and Julie head out of town, and leave Chase and Savannah at home to watch Grayson overnight for the first time. They hope they will follow the rules, but Chase and Savannah have plans of their own.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Down and Derby

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Deja MOO!: Llama-Rama Ding-Dong

programme.title: Mission Declassified: Decoding America's UFO Secrets

programme.title: Mission Declassified: The Axeman of New Orleans

programme.title: Mission Declassified: The Black Dahlia Murder

programme.title: Mission Declassified: Escape From Alcatraz
programme.desc: Three prisoners escaped from Alcatraz in 1962. Officially, they died in the surrounding waters, but FBI files say otherwise. Christof Putzel braves those same waters to hunt down inside information before going on a manhunt to Brazil.

programme.title: Unearthed: Quest for the Seven Wonders
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal the dark secrets of the ancient world's seven wonders. In an international archaeological expedition, experts follow fresh leads to find if these long-lost marvels ever existed.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Tesla's Darkest Secrets
programme.desc: New investigations into the mysterious work of Nikola Tesla are revealing the darkest secrets of this strange inventor's mind. Using the latest evidence, experts might discover a top-secret international cover-up to silence him.

programme.title: Curse of the Bermuda Triangle: Vanishing of Flight 19
programme.desc: Five US Navy planes vanish without a trace in the Bermuda Triangle, fueling speculation that this strange stretch of water is cursed. Using the latest science and tech, a team of experts investigate why the planes disappeared and where they are today.

programme.title: Unearthed: Curse of the Seventh Wonder
programme.desc: The Lighthouse of Alexandria is one of the world's original Seven Wonders, but it could have been home to a mysterious superweapon, and using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate the secrets of this fabled death ray and its long-lost home.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Tesla's Darkest Secrets
programme.desc: New investigations into the mysterious work of Nikola Tesla are revealing the darkest secrets of this strange inventor's mind. Using the latest evidence, experts might discover a top-secret international cover-up to silence him.

programme.title: Curse of the Bermuda Triangle: Vanishing of Flight 19
programme.desc: Five US Navy planes vanish without a trace in the Bermuda Triangle, fueling speculation that this strange stretch of water is cursed. Using the latest science and tech, a team of experts investigate why the planes disappeared and where they are today.

programme.title: Unearthed: Secrets of the Seven Wonders

programme.title: See No Evil: Rhonda's Gone
programme.desc: On December 2nd 2014, Rhonda Daugherty vanishes. Detectives turn to the public for information on her mysterious disappearance. A tip leads investigators to surveillance footage from a hotel where they uncover a journey of duplicity and deception.

programme.title: Murder Comes Home: Red Mustang
programme.desc: When 22-year-old LeAnne Martinez fails to pick up her daughter from her mother's house, her family worries. Her red Mustang is missing, and what they find inside her home will leave them forever scarred.

programme.title: Body Cam: Armed and Dangerous
programme.desc: In California, police face off against a knife-wielding bodybuilder. A wanted criminal draws an officer into a brawl in a sex shop and a fleeing suspect drives a car directly at officers to escape.

programme.title: Body Cam: On the Edge
programme.desc: Arkansas police stop a knife man enraged over a midnight pot roast. In Delray Beach, officers must rescue two children teetering on a ledge with their mom who's high on drugs. A trespasser in Utah attacks an officer with his own baton.
